description:
You are on-call as a Kubernetes operator who keeps all versioned manifest files under
/home/user/k8s/manifests/.

Current directory listing (already present before you start):

/home/user/k8s/manifests/
├── deployment-v1.yaml
├── deployment-v2.yaml
├── service.yaml
└── current  (symbolic link → deployment-v1.yaml)

Your objective
1. Replace the existing symbolic link named “current” so that it now points to deployment-v2.yaml instead of deployment-v1.yaml.
   • Do not remove the file first; simply update the link in place.
   • The inode of deployment-v1.yaml must remain untouched; only the link target of “current” changes.

Validation rules (what the automated checker will verify)
• A symbolic link called /home/user/k8s/manifests/current must exist.
• readlink -f /home/user/k8s/manifests/current must resolve to /home/user/k8s/manifests/deployment-v2.yaml.
• /home/user/k8s/manifests/deployment-v1.yaml and /home/user/k8s/manifests/deployment-v2.yaml must still be regular files.
• No extra files should be created.

Hint
This entire operation can be completed with a single command by overwriting the existing link.

End-state directory tree (desired):
/home/user/k8s/manifests/
├── deployment-v1.yaml
├── deployment-v2.yaml
├── service.yaml
└── current  (symbolic link → deployment-v2.yaml)
truth:
Initial state (before agent action):
Directory /home/user/k8s/manifests/ exists with permissions 755.
Files:
 - /home/user/k8s/manifests/deployment-v1.yaml (regular file, size 11 bytes, contents: "version: v1\n")
 - /home/user/k8s/manifests/deployment-v2.yaml (regular file, size 11 bytes, contents: "version: v2\n")
 - /home/user/k8s/manifests/service.yaml     (regular file, contents irrelevant for this task)
 - /home/user/k8s/manifests/current          (symbolic link → deployment-v1.yaml)

Expected final state:
Symbolic link /home/user/k8s/manifests/current resolves (readlink -f) to /home/user/k8s/manifests/deployment-v2.yaml.
Both deployment-v1.yaml and deployment-v2.yaml remain regular files with their original contents unchanged.
No new files other than the updated link should exist inside /home/user/k8s/manifests/.
name: task_000000_d4c5e54e
